improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion:
<meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try three free searches, then unlock unlimited access from US$2/day.">
<meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant">
<meta property="og:description" content="Instant AI answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace for business owners and traders. Powered by Claude. Start with 3 free searches.">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:image" content="https://gdn.ai/og-image.jpg">
<meta property="og:url" content="https://gdn.ai/">
<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
improvements.rationale: A compelling meta description improves click-through rates from search results by clearly communicating the value proposition (Claude-powered, trade/business focus, free trial). Open Graph tags ensure professional, consistent previews when shared on LinkedIn, Twitter, or Facebook—critical channels for reaching business professionals. Including the free trial and pricing transparency builds trust and pre-qualifies visitors.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat support, and a dedicated workspace to streamline your operations. Try three searches free — no card required."
improvements.rationale: The headline immediately introduces Gideon by name and clarifies its purpose, building brand recognition. The subheading highlights three core value props (instant answers, voice chat, workspace) while emphasizing the risk-free trial with 'no card required' to reduce friction and boost conversions.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to choose a membership plan to continue. Plans start from just US$2 per day, billed monthly or annually—with annual billing saving you 30 percent. As a member, you'll unlock unlimited access to Gideon's AI-powered trade and business support, voice chat, and your own dedicated workspace.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in a freemium model—what happens when the free trial ends. By clearly explaining the transition, pricing, and benefits, it reduces uncertainty and builds trust, helping convert trial users into paying members.
